name: Summer Accelerator
milestone: Sales page live with Stripe payment links
note: The flagship paid programme. Full sales page at /summer-accelerators.

name: Revision Diagnostic funnel
milestone: Switch on the remaining follow-up automations
note: Tool live, 16-email sequence built in MailerLite. Instant report and Summer route on, the rest await your review. Triage tracks the live count.

name: Results Day Rescue
note: Calm decision tool for results morning. Roadmap item 1. Results day is Thursday 13 August.

name: Parent Diagnostic
milestone: Ship late August, before school starts
note: The diagnostic reworded for the buyer. Highest conversion tool on the roadmap.

name: Topic Audit
milestone: September to early October, Biology and Chemistry first
note: Topic-level weakness data per student. You sanity-check the spec topic lists.

name: Mock Result Debrief
milestone: Ship early November, before mock season
note: Post-mortem tool for mock results. Feeds spring cohort decisions.

name: First real results data
note: First outcome data. Until it arrives, no grade claims anywhere in marketing.
